description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, cylindrical wooden handle and a large, solid metal head. The handle is straight and appears to be made from a single piece of wood, showing a natural grain and a slightly weathered finish. The head is rectangular with rounded edges, constructed from dark, heavy metal, and is securely fitted onto the handle. Both striking faces of the head are flat and broad, designed for delivering powerful blows to hard surfaces. The overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for demanding tasks such as breaking concrete or driving stakes. There are no visible brand markings, accessories, or significant signs of wear on the hammer.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a straight wooden handle and a large, rectangular metal head. The tool is sturdy and built for high-impact tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular metal head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the flat striking face of the metal head and the circular cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the handle and the broad metal head, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden handle and the back face of the metal head.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle with a natural grain, slightly weathered, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head made of solid metal with two flat striking faces and rounded edges
